# XLSMART Package Advisor — Claude API Prompt Template

**Source:** `data/xlsmart-products.json` (26 products)
**Generated by:** Gunawan / GUN-32
**Target model:** `claude-sonnet-4-6` (or `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` for lower cost)
**Prompt caching:** System prompt block should use `cache_control: { type: "ephemeral" }` — the catalog is static and reused across all requests.

---

## Cost Estimate

| Model | Input (est. 1,600 tok) | Output (est. 350 tok) | Per request (cold) | Per request (cache hit) |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| claude-sonnet-4-6 | $0.0048 | $0.0053 | ~$0.010 | ~$0.0006 |
| claude-haiku-4-5 | $0.0004 | $0.0004 | ~$0.001 | ~$0.00007 |

Recommendation: use Sonnet for quality; switch to Haiku if cost per session becomes a concern at scale.

---

## System Prompt

> **Implementation note for Quinn:** Pass this as the `system` parameter in the Messages API. Apply `cache_control: { type: "ephemeral" }` to the last text block (the catalog block) so the 26-product catalog is cached across requests. See Anthropic prompt caching docs.

```
You are the XLSMART Package Advisor — an AI assistant that recommends the best XLSMART enterprise product(s) for Indonesian SME owners.

Your role is to analyse a business owner's industry, company size, and primary needs, then recommend the most relevant 1–2 XLSMART products from the catalog below.

## Output Rules

Return ONLY a valid JSON object. Do not add any prose, explanation, or markdown outside the JSON.

Output schema:
{
  "recommendations": [
    {
      "product_id": "<id from catalog>",
      "product_name": "<name from catalog>",
      "fit_reason": "<one sentence explaining why this product fits THIS specific user, referencing their industry or size>",
      "cta": "<one action sentence — always end with: Hubungi tim sales XLSMART untuk konsultasi gratis.>"
    }
  ],
  "summary": "<1–2 sentence overall summary in Bahasa Indonesia, addressed directly to the user, e.g. 'Untuk bisnis Anda di sektor retail dengan 20 karyawan...'>"
}

## Rules

- Recommend exactly 1 product if one is a clear fit; recommend 2 only if both add distinct value.
- Never recommend more than 2 products.
- Only recommend products that exist in the catalog below (match by id).
- The fit_reason must be specific to the user's inputs — never generic.
- The summary must be in Bahasa Indonesia.
- The cta field must always end with: "Hubungi tim sales XLSMART untuk konsultasi gratis."
- If the user's inputs are too vague to make a confident recommendation, recommend the single best general-purpose product and note uncertainty in the summary.
- Do not invent pricing. All products are priced via sales consultation unless the catalog states otherwise.

## XLSMART Product Catalog (26 products)
```

---

## User Message Template

Pass the following as the `user` turn, substituting the three values:

```
Saya adalah pemilik usaha di industri: {{INDUSTRY_LABEL}}
Ukuran perusahaan saya: {{COMPANY_SIZE_LABEL}}
Kebutuhan utama bisnis saya: {{PRIMARY_NEEDS_LABELS}}

Rekomendasikan paket XLSMART yang paling sesuai untuk saya.
```

**Variable mapping (from `data/question-options.json`):**

| Variable | Source | Example |
|---|---|---|
| `{{INDUSTRY_LABEL}}` | `questions[0].options[n].label_en` | `"Logistics & Transportation"` |
| `{{COMPANY_SIZE_LABEL}}` | `questions[1].options[n].label_en` | `"Medium (11–50 employees)"` |
| `{{PRIMARY_NEEDS_LABELS}}` | `questions[2].options[n].label_en` joined by ` dan ` | `"Fleet / Logistics Management dan IoT & Operational Automation"` |

Use `label_en` for the API call (the system prompt is in English). The UI labels (`label` field) are in Bahasa Indonesia for display to users.

---

## Expected Output Example

Input: industry=logistics_transportation, size=medium, needs=fleet_logistics+iot_automation

```json
{
  "recommendations": [
    {
      "product_id": "smart-transportation",
      "product_name": "Smart Transportation",
      "fit_reason": "Bisnis logistik Anda dengan 11–50 karyawan dapat langsung memanfaatkan pelacakan armada real-time dan analisis perilaku pengemudi untuk menekan biaya bahan bakar.",
      "cta": "Optimalkan efisiensi armada Anda hari ini. Hubungi tim sales XLSMART untuk konsultasi gratis."
    },
    {
      "product_id": "connectivity-plus",
      "product_name": "Connectivity+",
      "fit_reason": "Connectivity+ melengkapi Smart Transportation dengan manajemen konektivitas terpusat untuk seluruh perangkat IoT dan SIM karyawan di armada Anda.",
      "cta": "Kelola seluruh konektivitas armada dari satu dashboard. Hubungi tim sales XLSMART untuk konsultasi gratis."
    }
  ],
  "summary": "Untuk bisnis logistik Anda dengan sekitar 11–50 karyawan, kombinasi Smart Transportation dan Connectivity+ memberikan visibilitas penuh atas operasi armada sekaligus kontrol penggunaan data secara terpusat."
}
```

---

## SDK Integration Notes for Quinn

```typescript
// Anthropic SDK — prompt caching on the catalog block
const response = await anthropic.messages.create({
  model: "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  max_tokens: 512,
  system: [
    {
      type: "text",
      text: SYSTEM_PROMPT,           // full text above
      cache_control: { type: "ephemeral" }  // cache the catalog
    }
  ],
  messages: [
    {
      role: "user",
      content: buildUserMessage(industry, companySize, primaryNeeds)
    }
  ]
});

const result = JSON.parse(response.content[0].text);
// result.recommendations[0].product_id, .fit_reason, .cta
// result.summary
```

- `max_tokens: 512` is sufficient. The output schema is compact.
- Parse failures: if `JSON.parse` throws, fall back to `data/recommendation-matrix.md` logic.
- Rate limiting: Sonnet tier limits apply. Cache hits are counted at 10% of normal input token price.
- The system prompt is ~1,500 tokens. Cache creation is charged at 1.25× once per 5-minute TTL window; cache reads are 0.1× on subsequent calls within the TTL.

---

## Assumptions

- The catalog is embedded verbatim in the system prompt (not passed per request) because it is static and benefits from prompt caching.
- Indonesian SME owners are the end users; the UI is in Bahasa Indonesia but the Claude prompt operates in English for reliability.
- `fit_reason` in the output is expected in Bahasa Indonesia (Claude will follow the user message language). Quinn should not translate this field.
- The `cta` field always ends with the standard XLSMART sales CTA sentence — this is enforced in the system prompt rule.
- Product pricing is not shown in the recommendation UI except for `gsm-postpaid` (IDR 65,000/month). Quinn should hard-code this exception.
